title: Chat Emojis
description: This mod enhances the Minecraft chat experience by allowing you to type emojis using simple tags like :emojiName: instead of relying on OS-level input (e.g., Windows emoji picker).
body:
# 💬 Chat Emoji Mod (Fabric)

This mod enhances the Minecraft chat experience by allowing you to type emojis using simple tags like `:emojiName:` instead of relying on OS-level input (e.g., Windows emoji picker). When you press `Tab`, the tag is automatically replaced with the corresponding emoji character, which can be set by the user.

---

## ✨ Features

- 🔄 **Tag-to-Emoji Conversion**: Type `:emojiName:` and press `Tab` to auto-replace it with your custom emoji.
- 🎨 **Live Highlighting**: Emoji tags in chat are highlighted as you type, with a preview of the emoji above the text.
- 💾 **Persistent Storage**: Emojis are saved to `.minecraft/emojis.dat` and loaded automatically on startup.
- ➕ **Custom Emoji Support**: Add your own emoji mappings with an easy in-game command.
- 🧹 **Emoji Deletion**: Remove emoji mappings in-game just as easily.

---

## 📷 Showcase

### Typing & Replacing with Tab
![Emjoi showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/98ea0888ecfb90087a206b6cb02197afaa513239.png)
### Creating a Custom Emoji
```mcfunction
/emoji create showcase "🙂"
```
![Custom created emoji showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cc5d6e99b7ec437452be6a14d6dbf7e7a4d07838.png)
